sentences.arabic: تَمْتَازُ اللُّغَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ بِقُوَّةِ أَلْفَاظِهَا وَدِقَّةِ مَعَانِيهَا.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik se odlikuje snagom svojih riječi i preciznošću značenja.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is characterized by the strength of its words and the precision of its meanings.

sentences.arabic: النَّثْرُ العَرَبِيُّ القَدِيمُ مَلِيءٌ بِالحِكَمِ وَالمَوَاعِظِ البَلِيغَةِ.
sentences.translation: Klasična arapska proza puna je mudrosti i rječitih savjeta.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient Arabic prose is full of wisdom and eloquent advice.

sentences.arabic: يَهْتَمُّ الأُدَبَاءُ بِتَرْتِيبِ الكَلِمَاتِ لِتَكُونَ مِثْلَ المَوْسِيقَى فِي الأُذُنِ.
sentences.translation: Književnici vode računa o poretku riječi kako bi zvučale poput muzike u uhu.
sentences.translationEn: Writers care about the arrangement of words so they sound like music to the ear.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَقْرَأُ نَصًّا بَلِيغًا، تَشْعُرُ بِرَوْعَةِ التَّعْبِيرِ وَعُمْقِ الفِكْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada čitate rječit tekst, osjetite divotu izražavanja i dubinu ideje.
sentences.translationEn: When you read an eloquent text, you feel the magnificence of expression and the depth of the idea.

sentences.arabic: القِرَاءَةُ الدَّائِمَةُ تُطَوِّرُ مَهَارَةَ الكِتَابَةِ عِنْدَ الطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Stalno čitanje razvija vještinu pisanja kod učenika.
sentences.translationEn: Continuous reading develops writing skills in students.
